summary: The input batch underwent rigorous processing. Several words were split: 'ገላጋይነትና' into 'ገላጋይነት' and 'ና'; 'አለፍከውኮ' into 'አለፍከው' and 'ኮ'; 'ፍሰሐንና' into 'ፍሰሐን' and 'ና'; and 'ተረጋጊና' into 'ተረጋጊ' and 'ና'. The single-character conjunctions/particles 'ና' and 'ኮ' were discarded as they lack standalone semantic value for dictionary entries. Visual OCR repairs (Scholarly Guesses) were applied to: 'ተመርጠጣለች' corrected to 'ተመርጣለች' (changing 'ጠ' to 'ጣ'); 'ካከራከራ' corrected to 'ካከራከረ' (changing 'ራ' to 'ረ' to reflect a common verb form); and 'ከወለድች' corrected to 'ከወለደች' (changing 'ድ' to 'ደ'). All remaining words were lemmatized to their global citation forms, comprehensive English synonyms were provided, and their major parts of speech were assigned. All words met the minimum two-character length requirement.

The input batch underwent rigorous processing according to the 8 scholarly protocols. Several words required specific interventions:

Splits:
- 'ባዬሎጂና' was split into 'ባዬሎጂ' and 'ና'. Only 'ባዬሎጂ' was retained as a meaningful dictionary entry.
- 'ኔትወርኩና' was split into 'ኔትወርኩ' and 'ና'. Only 'ኔትወርኩ' was retained.
- 'ስራመድና' was split into 'ስራመድ' and 'ና'. Only 'ስራመድ' was retained.
- 'ተጋበዘና' was split into 'ተጋበዘ' and 'ና'. Only 'ተጋበዘ' was retained.

Discards:
- 'ተሽንዲና', 'ተቲሊሊ', and 'ተባጉና' were discarded as they were identified as unfixable gibberish or severe OCR noise with no discernible semantic or functional value.

Scholarly Guesses and Visual Repairs:
- 'በሴከም' was corrected to 'በሰከንድ' (in a second), with 'ሰከንድ' identified as the root.
- 'ተሻኳና' was corrected to 'ተሻከመና' (and he carried), with 'መሸከም' as the root.
- 'ተየገጠሩ' was corrected to 'ተገጠሩ' (they were assembled), with 'መገጠር' as the root.
- 'ባዬሎጂ' (from 'ባዬሎጂና') was corrected to 'ባዮሎጂ'.
- 'ከአውፓዊያን' was corrected to 'ከአውሮፓውያን' (from Europeans), with 'አውሮፓዊ' as the root.
- 'ሙክራ' was corrected to 'ሙከራ' (attempt/experiment).

All remaining words were successfully lemmatized, translated, and tagged with their major Part of Speech, adhering to the minimum two-character length constraint for both the cleaned word and its root.

The input batch was processed through 8 scholarly protocols. The word 'ችሁን' was discarded as it was deemed an unfixable fragment or nonsense. The word 'ኣደንቀዋለሁ' underwent visual correction from 'ኣ' to 'አ' resulting in 'አደንቀዋለሁ'. The word 'የዲሞክራሲዊ' had its root lemmatized to 'ዲሞክራሲያዊ' to reflect the standard adjectival suffix. The merged word 'በዳቦርሜዳ' was split, and 'ዳቦር ሜዳ' was extracted as the core lexical unit. Similarly, 'በኤሊናና' was split, and 'ኤሊና' was extracted as the core lexical unit. For words like 'ከእያሪኮ' and 'ከጦረኝነት', the full input word including the prepositional prefix was retained in the 'word' field, while the base noun was provided as the 'root'.

The input batch underwent rigorous processing according to the 8 scholarly protocols. Several words required splitting to isolate core lexical units: 'በኤሌክትሮንክስ' yielded 'ኤሌክትሮንክስ', 'ትዳሬንና' yielded 'ትዳር', 'ሥለማውጣቱ' yielded 'ማውጣት', 'ከሚጢጢዬ' yielded 'ሚጢጢ', 'ለመላዕከ' yielded 'መልአክ', 'ያላዘዝኩትንና' yielded 'ማዘዝ', 'ከሚበለጧቸው' yielded 'መብለጥ', 'የኮርፖሬቶች' yielded 'ኮርፖሬት', and 'አለማየሁምበWORLD' was split into 'አለማየሁ' and 'WORLD'. In these splits, single-character prepositions, conjunctions, and grammatical suffixes were removed to extract the primary dictionary entry. No words were discarded as unfixable gibberish. Scholarly Guesses and corrections were applied to 'መቋቋ' which was corrected to 'መቋቋም' (to resist/cope) due to its incomplete form, and 'ይሆነናላ' was corrected to 'ይሆነናል' (it will be for us) as 'ይሆነናላ' is a non-standard spelling. 'ኒቦሳ', 'አባቡልጎ', 'ኢንፎትራዳ', and 'ሩባክስ' were identified as proper nouns lacking common Amharic roots. 'ለመላዕከ' was lemmatized to the singular 'መልአክ' (angel/messenger) for dictionary consistency. 'የሚያክልልኝ' was lemmatized to 'ማከል' (to be equal/sufficient) based on its contextual meaning.

The input batch was processed through 8 scholarly protocols. Several words required splitting to isolate the core dictionary entry: 'ቦታዎችንስ' (to 'ቦታ'), 'ልማዱንም' (to 'ልማድ'), 'የእስላሙም' (to 'እስላም'), 'ያለመክፈልና' (to 'አለመክፈል'), 'አስተዋፆኦውም' (to 'አስተዋጽኦ'), 'ሕሊናዬንና' (to 'ሕሊና'), and 'እንድንቀስምባቸውና' (to 'መቀስም').

Three words were discarded: 'የንዶዳሞን' was identified as a non-Amharic proper noun or foreign word lacking general dictionary value. 'አመርትነሽ' was deemed a non-standard compound or potential OCR error, possibly a sentence fragment, and thus lacked a clear dictionary entry. 'ሀይስም' was split, and 'ሀይ' (often a borrowed interjection 'Hi') was discarded as low-value for a dictionary, while 'ስም' (name) was retained.

Visual OCR corrections were applied to 'አስተዋፆኦውም' (corrected to 'አስተዋጽኦውም') and 'ተነክቶአል' (corrected to 'ተነክቷል') for standard Amharic spelling. 'ፊላንዳዊው' was lemmatized to 'ፊላንዳዊ' and tagged as a Noun, referring to a 'Finnish person', which is its primary dictionary function. 'መስተበቅል' was recognized as a Ge'ez-derived noun for 'crucifixion'. The root for 'እንድንቀስምባቸውና' was determined to be 'መቀስም' (to learn/gain from) based on common usage and context, rather than 'መቀስቀስ'.

Processed 25 valid entries. Discarded 'አትጠመውም', 'ከእንዳሻው', 'ነጥበበመቶ', 'የመተማው', 'ጀአንድ', and 'ባያስቡብ' due to OCR corruption or lack of clear semantic root. 'መቃብርባላጋራም' was split into 'መቃብር' and 'ባላጋራ'. 'አዳርሰን' and 'አሳምረውና' were cleaned of conjunction suffixes.

The input batch was processed through all 8 scholarly protocols. Several words required splitting due to merged forms: 'ሁሉየአፉ' was split into 'ሁሉ' and 'የአፉ'; 'አለኝበተራዬ' was split into 'አለኝ' and 'በተራዬ'; and 'ከናይጄርያናይጄርያዊው' was split into 'ከናይጄርያ' and 'ናይጄርያዊው'. No words were discarded as gibberish or single characters. Visual repairs were minimal, primarily confirming correct Ethiopic characters. Lemmatization focused on identifying the global citation form (infinitive or base noun). For 'ካልመሳችሁ', 'መመዘዝ' (to draw/pull) was chosen as the root based on common usage, over 'መሰለ' (to seem/resemble). For 'ሚደፈሩ', the 'ሚ' prefix was recognized as an informal variant of 'የሚ' for lemmatization purposes, but the cleaned word retains the original 'ሚ' form. All words and their derived roots met the minimum two-character length requirement.

The input batch underwent rigorous processing according to the 8 scholarly protocols. Several words were identified for splitting: 'ከሚጠመቅባትና' into 'ከሚጠመቅባት' and 'ና'; 'ማስመስከሪያና' into 'ማስመስከሪያ' and 'ና'; 'ለሚጠብቀውና' into 'ለሚጠብቀው' and 'ና'; and 'ተረዳነውና' into 'ተረዳነው' and 'ና'. The fragment 'ና' was consistently lemmatized to 'እና' (and) and tagged as a Conjunction. The string 'îSt¾W' was deemed unfixable gibberish and discarded. For 'ባለሩ', the infinitive 'መበልጸግ' was chosen as the root to represent the concept of 'to be rich/wealthy'. For 'ማስመስከሪያ', while it can function as a noun (certificate), the verbal infinitive 'ማስመስከር' (to certify) was selected as the root for consistency in verb lemmatization. 'ሼንጀን' and 'ጃቢዬር' were identified as proper nouns (a city and a personal name, respectively). 'ቪዡዋል' was recognized as an Amharic transliteration of the English loanword 'visual'.

summary: Processed 30 input strings. Applied Protocol 1 (THE SPLITTER) to identify and separate prefixes/suffixes and conjunctions from core words, resulting in multiple entries for some original inputs (e.g., 'ቢሆንልንና' split into 'ቢሆንልን' and 'እና'). Protocol 2 (THE JUDGE) and 7 (THE FILTER) led to the discarding of single-character prepositions ('ከ', 'ለ', 'በ', 'የ') and emphatic particles ('ም', 'ኮ') as they lack independent dictionary value. Protocol 3 (THE CORRECTOR) addressed visual OCR confusions: 'አስፓል' was corrected to 'አስፋልት', 'ብላለቻ' and 'ተዋግታለቻ' had their trailing 'አ' removed as noise, 'እማያነጋግር' was standardized to 'የማያነጋግር', 'ተችሏለ' to 'ተችሏል', 'እተመዘገበ' to 'እየተመዘገበ', and 'ሆስታፒል' to 'ሆስፒታል'. Protocol 4 (THE LEMMATIZER) identified the infinitive or base form for all verbs and nouns. Protocol 5 (THE TRANSLATOR) provided comprehensive English synonyms. Protocol 6 (THE GRAMMARIAN) assigned major Parts of Speech. 'ገርዓልታ' and 'ጀጁ' were identified as proper nouns based on their morphology and context, treated as 'Scholarly Guesses' for specific names/places.

summary: The input batch underwent rigorous processing according to the 8 scholarly protocols. Several words were identified as merged and were successfully split into their constituent meaningful parts. For instance, 'በኋላኮ' was split into 'በኋላ', 'ከነዩኒፎርሞቻቸው' yielded 'ዩኒፎርም', 'የንግድማስፋፊያ' became 'ንግድ' and 'ማስፋፊያ', 'ብርየቀረውን' was separated into 'ብር' and 'መቅረት', 'የየዓረብያን' into 'ዓረብ', 'ነገዳቸውንና' into 'ነገድ', 'በአፍጋንስታን' into 'አፍጋንስታን', 'የለኝምኮ' into 'አለ', 'በማዕክሉ' into 'ማዕከል', 'ይኖሯልም' into 'መኖር', 'በአኩስቲክስ' into 'አኩስቲክስ', 'እንደሚፈታለትም' into 'መፈታት', 'ዱርሄዱ' into 'ዱር' and 'መሄድ', 'ከዛቻም' into 'ዛቻ', and 'ታጭቆበትም' into 'መታጨቅ'. The particles 'ኮ', 'ና', 'ም', 'ከ', 'በ', 'የየ' were stripped as they are not standalone dictionary entries. No words were deemed unfixable gibberish or discarded due to lack of semantic value. Visual OCR confusions were not explicitly detected in this batch, but the corrector protocol was applied. All words were lemmatized to their global citation forms (infinitives for verbs, base nouns for nouns). Comprehensive English synonyms were provided, and each entry was tagged with one of the seven major Parts of Speech. Finally, all single-character words or roots were filtered out, ensuring all included entries are at least two characters long. A scholarly guess was made for 'ስላምጌ', interpreting it as a proper noun due to its structure.
